description: A customer with a business account reports intermittent packet loss affecting their VoIP service.

nodes.task_description: Identify the business customer and their service details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the account and service.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a 15-minute remote line monitoring session to capture real-time quality metrics.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully starts the line monitoring tool.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the monitoring results to confirm packet loss and identify the network segment where it originates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent analyzes the report and determines the packet loss is occurring at a specific network node.

nodes.task_description: Create a high-priority trouble ticket for the network engineering team with the monitoring logs attached.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed ticket and assigns it to the correct engineering queue.
